name: Favorite Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and milk in a pan. Bring to a boil until it reaches the soft ball stage or 235°F on a candy thermometer.
2. Remove from heat and add peanut butter, marshmallow cream, and vanilla. Beat until smooth.
3. Pour into a 9-inch square pan that has been coated with butter.
4. Makes 36 pieces of candy.
